title: Chat Config
description: Allows you to customize your chat!
body:
Chat Config

------------------------------------

An easy to use mod that allows you to nickname yourself in chat, individually color your name and your messages, and more! 

-------------------------------------

Current Features:

- Easy to use nicknaming system, coloring system, and more.

- One simple command to do just about any everything.

- Using the command /gamerule showTime, you will now be able to see what time the messages were sent.

------------------------------------

Use the '/chat ______' command to get started!
